response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-05:01: Analyzed video segments. 2. 00:00-02:57: Promo/collage, instrumental background music only. 3. 02:57-03:13: Identified JOYSOUND promotional commercial with vocals. Transcribed lyrics. 4. 03:13-05:01: Promo/collage, instrumental background music only. 5. Identified no other vocal music. Song detected is a promotional jingle.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip featuring a collage of messages for 'hololive Live 2026 First MISSION', interspersed with promotional screens, including a commercial for the JOYSOUND 'Do Anime Sengen' campaign. The JOYSOUND commercial features a vocal jingle, while the rest of the video contains instrumental background music.

scenes.description: A collage of messages and promotional information regarding 'hololive Live 2026 First MISSION'. Background music is instrumental.
Promotional screen for 'hololive 5th Fes. Capture the Moment'. Background music is instrumental.
Commercial for JOYSOUND 'Do Anime Sengen' (Do Anime Declaration) featuring a girl singing a promotional jingle.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
アニメにハマって 歌いたくなっちゃった
推しのシーン見ながら カラオケ歌えるなんて
尊すぎてつらい
歌いたいアニメ・ゲームソング見つけよう
どアニメ宣言！JOYSOUND
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hooked on anime, I wanted to sing
Watching my favorite scene, being able to sing karaoke
It's too precious, it hurts
Let's find the anime/game songs we want to sing
Do Anime Declaration! JOYSOUND

scenes.description: Promotional screen for 'holoplus'. Background music is instrumental.
